description: CompositionBlack sneakers made with synthetic pppers, fabric lining and phylon sole shoe care1. Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThese sleek black sneakers from fila are great for cross training purposes and urban wear. The mesh and PU uppers give greater durability and support, and keep the feet dry for long. The carbon rubber outsole provides better grip with its aggressive grooves, while the moulded EVA mid-soles give a great cushioned ride making this a perfect urban wear.
